retry_reason: Failure (NULL) means no matching socket found; the socket may become available later (e.g., new connection), so retrying could succeed.
contract_summary: This function searches the global x25_list for a socket with matching LCI and neighbour. If found, it increments the socket's refcount via sock_hold and returns the socket pointer. The caller must release the reference with sock_put when done and must hold the appropriate lock (e.g., x25_list_lock) that protects x25_list during the call, as the list iteration is not self-synchronized. Returns NULL if no matching socket exists; the caller may retry later if conditions change (e.g., a new socket with that LCI becomes available).
